description: A league administrator needs to assign referees to all games for the upcoming week, ensuring no conflicts of interest.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the list of all games for the upcoming week and the list of all available referees.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the schedule and the list of officials.

nodes.task_description: Automatically assign referees to games based on their experience level, location, and avoiding any conflicts of interest (e.g., assigning a referee to their hometown team's game).

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a full, conflict-free assignment list.

nodes.task_description: Publish the assignments and notify each referee of their schedule for the week.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finalizes the assignments and sends out notifications.
